narrative:
Harrison Twp (precinct in Paulding County) has 981 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.3 percentage points.
